case_title: AMICA MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. SONIA ALVARADO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMICA MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ALVARADO, SONIA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-09-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-07-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-12-2002

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-09-2002 CONTINUED TO OCT-04-2002 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT (S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $133.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ALVARADO, SONIA
